MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff City View Storage, LLC is present. Represented by Jim Gallagher.
Attorney, Michael Rossoff is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Robert Warren is present and appearing with Limited Scope Attorney, Josephine L Alioto.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of October 09, 2012 is vacated.
